baslik: Yarının Kıvılcımları, Jaadugar: Moğolistan'da Bir Cadı, Şeker Çürüğü ve Daha Fazlası Ekranı 2026 Annecy Festivali'nde
ozet: 2026 Annecy Uluslararası Animasyon Film Festivali'nde Sparks of Tomorrow, Jaadugar: A Witch in Mongolia, Candy Caries ve daha fazlasını içeren seçkin bir dizi TV anime dizisi gösterilecek....
tamMetin:
A select slate of TV anime series will be screened at 2026 Annecy International Animation Film Festival in Annecy, France, which will run from June 21, 2026 to June 27, 2026.

The first episode of Sparks of Tomorrow will be screened in competition under Annecy Festival’s TV Films category, along with other anime series such as Jaadugar: A Witch in Mongolia, Candy Caries, and Takopi’s Original Sin.

Sparks of TomorrowSelected for the Official Competition (TV Films Category) at the Annecy International Animation Film Festival 2026!https://t.co/DKHurnqaGx#sparks_of_tomorrow#二十世紀電氣目録 pic.twitter.com/cNOrLppxLf— Sparks of Tomorrow (@sparks_of_tmr) March 24, 2026

Sparks of TomorrowSelected for the Official Competition (TV Films Category) at the Annecy International Animation Film Festival 2026!https://t.co/DKHurnqaGx#sparks_of_tomorrow#二十世紀電氣目録 pic.twitter.com/cNOrLppxLf

In addition, the festival’s Graduation Films category will feature screenings of two animated short films from Japan’s Tokyo University of the Arts. They include Yini Guo‘s Plankton α and Sam Kuwa‘s So He Grabbed the Knife.

Yasuhiro Aoki’s ChaO anime film won the Jury Award in the Feature Film category at the 2025 Annecy Festival. Ryo Orikasa‘s The Graffiti won the Off-Limits Award for the Short Film category and Masataka Kihara‘s Q won the Lotte Reiniger Award in the Graduation Films category.

Baku Kinoshita’s The Last Blossom was also screened in competition for the Feature Film category at last year’s festival. The Star Wars Visions episode “Black,” directed by Shinya Ohira, competed in the Short Films category, along with Yoriko Mizushiri’s French-Japanese co-produced Ordinary Life animated short.

All You Need Is Kill, Mononoke The Movie: Chapter II – The Ashes of Rage, and Nightmare Bugs were also part of Annecy Festival’s 2025 Midnight Specials category.

Sources: Annecy Festival Official Website (2), Anime News Network
